en: to truth seeking, and ultimately to trust building. Now, speaking of trust, ever since
I wrote this book, Lie Spotting, no one wants to meet me in person anymore. No, no, no,
ko: 그리고 궁극적으로 신뢰를 쌓는 거지. 신뢰에 대해 말하자면 내가 이 책 '거짓말 찾아내기'를 쓴 이후로
